title: geranium incanum var. multifidum
intro: Geranium incanum var. multifidum, also known as the Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain and swelling, and combating infections. The health benefits of Geranium incanum var. multifidum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce anxiety and stress, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent to extract the active compounds.
